title: 2019 USAMO Problems/Problem 2
solution:
PE \cap DC = M

AP' \cdot AB = AD^2

BP' \cdot AB = CD^2

P = P'

ADP \sim ABD

BCP \sim BAC

\measuredangle APD = \measuredangle BDA = \measuredangle BCA = \measuredangle CPB

\square

\measuredangle PEA = \measuredangle MEC = \measuredangle BEN

\measuredangle MEC = \measuredangle BEN
